question.label: Opening pace check
question.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
question.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

answer: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.

assessment.note: Says the pace is unsustainably high despite pride in the outcomes — strong wellbeing risk with mild positive investment in the work.

new_queue.label: Thread follow
new_queue.name: proud outcomes, pace — can you say more about what that means for you right now?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Delegation boundary
new_queue.name: What work are you still holding that someone else could own?

new_queue.label: Steadier rhythm
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel more sustainable?

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
